headline: Texas Pacific Land’s Data Center Pivot Might Change The Case For Investing In TPL
summary: Earlier this week, Texas Pacific Land Corporation confirmed a US$50,000,000 investment into a data infrastructure company to build large-scale data center campuses on its Permian Basin acreage, extending its land monetization beyond traditional oil and gas royalties and water services. This move highlights how a 130-year-old royalty and land business is seeking to repurpose its extensive West Texas footprint for digital infrastructure uses such as data centers. Next, we’ll examine how Texas...

headline: Texas Pacific Land Ties Permian Acreage To Data Infrastructure Growth
summary: Texas Pacific Land (NYSE:TPL) is committing US$50 million to data infrastructure, expanding beyond its traditional energy royalty model. The move introduces a new revenue stream tied to data related uses of its land holdings. This development follows a week in which most market attention around the stock centered on valuation and historical share performance. Texas Pacific Land has long been known for its energy related royalties across its extensive land position in Texas. By putting US$50...
